# Acme Corporation Guidelines

This document outlines the working agreements for contributors at Acme Corporation.
All team members are expected to read and acknowledge these guidelines before their
first week is complete.

## Responsibilities

**Jane Doe** is the primary author and maintainer of this document. Any proposed
changes should be submitted as a pull request and reviewed by at least one other
senior contributor.

*Bob Smith* is responsible for onboarding new hires and ensuring they receive a
copy of this document on day one. Questions about access provisioning should be
directed to him via the internal helpdesk.

## Project Chimera Update

The guidelines in this section are specific to contributors working on **Project Chimera**
and supplement the general policies above.

All **Project Chimera** work is classified as confidential until the public launch
announcement. Contributors must not discuss deliverables, timelines, or internal
tooling decisions outside of approved communication channels.

**Jane Doe** will conduct a weekly review of open tasks and post a summary to the
team channel every Monday morning. *Bob Smith* handles the external liaison role
for this project and is the single point of contact for partner queries.

## Amendments

Changes to these guidelines require sign-off from both **Jane Doe** and a
representative from Acme Corporation's legal team. Minor editorial fixes (typos,
formatting) may be merged by any senior contributor without formal review.
